Settings Sound: New Sound: Old Sound: Off Type of buttons: Option 1 Type of buttons: Option 2 Type of buttons: Option 3 Type of buttons: Option 4 Type of buttons: Option 5 Type of buttons: Option 6 Type of buttons: Random Color transfusion: Fast Color transfusion: Normal Color transfusion: Slow Color transfusion: Off Touch sensitive: 50% Touch sensitive: 75% Touch sensitive: 100% Touch sensitive: 125% Touch sensitive: 150% Language: English Language: Ukrainian Language: Russian Back Restart

Egg Large torus Concave icosphere Icosphere Large tetrahedron United cubes Large torus knot Modified triangle Spiral Large Menger sponge Closed spiral Super knot>
Back Easy Normal Hard Very Hard Start Triangle count: %1$d Complete previous level in less than %1$d steps to unlock this level
Level complete Pause %1$d/%2$d Step count: %1$d Exit to menu Back to game
Welcome to Flood it 3D Flood it 3D - is an exciting puzzle game that is the reincarnation of the good old game Flood it in the new format. The goal of the game - fill the model one color for the least amount of moves. Filling begins with a triangle marked by mark. Neighboring triangles of the same color will become active and will change more triangles on a similar principle. Try it - it\'s not as easy as it seems :) Understand
« »
If you enjoyed %1$s, please take a moment to rate it. Play Market not found Later Rate Never
